opinion.h4: PERK, AUDITOR OF CUYAHOGA COUNTY v. OHIO EX REL. CORRIGAN, PROSECUTING ATTORNEY OF CUYAHOGA COUNTY APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO No. 590. Decided December 8, 1969
opinion.p: Gerald A. Donahue and Donald M. Robiner for appellant.
John T. Corrigan, pro se, and John L. Dowling for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
MR. JUSTICE DOUGLAS is of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted.
opinion.h4: MISSISSIPPI POWER & LIGHT v. CAPITAL ELEC. POW. ASSN., 396 U.S. 113 (1969)
opinion.p: 396 U.S. 113 MISSISSIPPI POWER & LIGHT CO. v. CAPITAL ELECTRIC POWER ASSN. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF MISSISSIPPI No. 611. Decided December 8, 1969
Bernard G. Segal, Samuel D. Slade, Sherwood W. Wise, Garner W. Green, and Joshua Green for appellant.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
